# Render a value between 0 and 1 as a horizontal bar (Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

Render a value between 0 and 1 as a horizontal bar (Generated by Claude
Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

## Usage

``` r
render_bar_cell(
  fill_color = "#5D5165",
  bg_color = "#e8e8e8",
  show_value = TRUE
)
```

## Arguments

- fill_color:

  Color of the bar

- bg_color:

  Background track color

- show_value:

  Whether to show the numeric value alongside

## Value

A function that can be used as a reactable cell renderer for numeric
columns, which renders the value as a horizontal bar
